text.tspan: Relative difference in global population estimates, UN vs. US Census
Relative difference in global and regional population estimates between UN population division and US Census Bureau
sources, measured as the difference as a percentage of UN figures (i.e.UN minus US Census Bureau values, divided by UN
population figures). Negative figures therefore indicate lower UN estimates relative to the US Census Bureau, and vice versa.
Source: Differences in population estimates, OWID based on UN vs US Census Bureau
